Review rejected: plan.service.ts lines 1236-1242: When adding listTasksCache.invalidate, the broadcastToProject call was accidentally dedented outside the `if (status === "open")` block. It now runs for every task in the archive loop, including in_progress tasks. This incorrectly broadcasts status "closed" for tasks that were not closed. The broadcastToProject must remain inside the if block.
